title: lithocarpus inversus
intro: Lithocarpus densiflorus, also known as Lithocarpus inversus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Pacific coast of North America, characterized by its dense, conical crown and large, leathery leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus inversus include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Lithocarpus inversus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
